name: Login Failures Followed By Success to the same Username
notes: Reports multiple log in failure followed by a successful login from the same user
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success match at least 1 times in 5 minutes after Authentication: Multiple Login Failures for Single Username match with the same Username
conditions_text: when BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success match at least 1 times in 5 minutes after Authentication: Multiple Login Failures for Single Username match with the same Username
thresholds: when BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success match at least 1 times in 5 minutes after Authentication: Multiple Login Failures for Single Username match with the same Username
TD_list: APPLY Login Failures Followed By Success to the same Username on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success match at least 1 times in 5 minutes after Authentication: Multiple Login Failures for Single Username match with the same Username
RED_list: Event name: Login Failures Followed By Success from the same Username
Event description: Detected several authentication failures from the same username followed by a successful login.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Username
This information should not contribute to the naming of the associated offense(s)
